_note: Approximate all-time records (all competitions) for marquee/likely WC26 matchups. Keyed by alphabetical FIFA codes; aWins = first code, bWins = second. Curated + fact-checked; counts vary slightly by source/federation.

ARG-BRA.note: The Superclásico de las Américas — football's most even heavyweight feud (totals are officially disputed).

FRA-GER.lastMeeting: France knocked Germany out of Euro 2016 & World Cup 2014
FRA-GER.note: France finally exorcised the ghost of Seville '82 (the 3-3, 5-4 pens horror).

ARG-GER.note: Three World Cup finals between them (1986, 1990, 2014) — nobody else can say that.

ARG-FRA.note: Mbappé's hat-trick still lost to Messi's coronation in the greatest final ever played.

BRA-FRA.note: Dead even at 6-6. Zidane's 1998 final and 2006 masterclass are why Brazilians still flinch.

BRA-GER.note: Brazil leads comfortably, yet lost the one that mattered most — the 7-1 Mineirazo.

ENG-GER.note: 1966 and a thousand penalty nightmares; Euro 2020 finally broke the tournament hoodoo.

ARG-ENG.note: Hand of God, the Maradona slalom, Beckham's red, and Owen's 1998 wonder-goal.

ARG-NED.note: Five World Cup meetings, dead level. The 2022 tunnel brawl was just the latest chapter.

ESP-POR.lastMeeting: 2025 Nations League final — POR 2-2 ESP (5-3 pens)
ESP-POR.note: Iberian neighbours: Spain leads on paper, Portugal grabbed the trophy in Munich 2025.

NED-POR.note: The 2006 'Battle of Nuremberg' set a World Cup record: four reds and 16 yellows.

BEL-FRA.note: One of football's oldest fixtures (since 1904); Belgium leads, France won the one everyone remembers.

ARG-URU.note: The Clásico del Río de la Plata — among the most-played international fixtures on Earth (counts vary 196-214).

MEX-USA.note: Dos a Cero is the USMNT war cry, but Mexico's record 10th Gold Cup reasserted El Tri's throne.

ESP-MAR.note: Bono's shootout heroics sent Morocco past their former colonial power to a historic semi-final.

JPN-KOR.note: South Korea dominates the all-time series; co-hosting 2002 made these neighbours uneasy allies.

NED-USA.note: Oranje have owned this one, ending the USMNT's 2022 run with a clinical counter.
